name: Vercel AI Cloud Reference
description: A monochrome developer-platform system inspired by Vercel public pages, with sharp typography, command-oriented CTAs, product mega-nav patterns, deployment panels, metric cards, and dense documentation footers.

en.name: Vercel AI Cloud Reference
en.description: A monochrome developer-platform system inspired by Vercel public pages, with sharp typography, command-oriented CTAs, product mega-nav patterns, deployment panels, metric cards, and dense documentation footers.

zh-CN.name: Vercel AI 云参考
zh-CN.description: 受 Vercel 公开页面启发的黑白开发者平台系统，包含锐利排版、命令式 CTA、产品大型导航模式、部署面板、指标卡片和高密度文档页脚。
